message:
fix(test): add ScoredResult.index field + proptest regression seed

- proptest_search_bridge.rs: add `index: None` field to ScoredResult
  construction to match upstream frankensearch struct change
- New proptest regression seed for fork_hardening_caps that triggered
  a failure with capacity=55 and a specific item sequence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 141ed30382820a19d0ff861ef503d6f4b84de5e434e34a5944a9ee15d29382ad # shrinks to capacity = 55, items = [2440, 3957, 2277, 8218, 8338]

@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ fn arb_scored_result(id_prefix: &'static str) -> impl Strategy<Value = ScoredRes
         doc_id: format!("{id_prefix}-{idx}"),
         score: score.abs().clamp(0.0, 1.0),
         source: frankensearch::ScoreSource::Hybrid,
+        index: None,
         fast_score: None,
         quality_score: None,
         lexical_score: None,
